extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI Michał won the 6.6km prologue by 1.66 seconds over VAN EMDEN Jos, while GC contenders THOMAS Geraint crashed and BARDET/NIBALI lost 20+ seconds.
tactical_patterns: Sky deployed three-card tactic in prologue with KWIATKOWSKI, THOMAS, MOSCON all top performers despite THOMAS crash.
VAN EMDEN Jos set early benchmark time forcing GC favorites to overextend; Dutch specialist pacing strategy exposed weaker time trialists.
BARDET Romain and NIBALI Vincenzo both lost 20+ seconds in flat prologue, signaling poor time trial form pre-Tour.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: Won prologue after 40-day racing absence, showing peak Tour preparation form in specialist discipline.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Major crash mid-prologue yet finished only 21 seconds down, indicating strong but compromised GC position.
rider_signals.VAN EMDEN Jos: positive: Second place as non-GC rider proves Team LottoNL-Jumbo time trial depth threatens team time trial stages.
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: Third place confirms Sky's multi-leader depth beyond designated GC captains THOMAS and KWIATKOWSKI.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Finished ~50th, 20+ seconds down on flat 6.6km course exposes critical time trial weakness before Tour.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Similar 20+ second loss to BARDET after three-year Dauphiné absence suggests insufficient stage race preparation.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Finished alongside THOMAS at +21 seconds despite no crash, revealing time trial remains limiting factor.
rider_signals.CASTROVIEJO Jonathan: positive: Top-ten finish as domestique suggests strong form for supporting Sky leaders in later time trials.
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: Top-ten performance confirms Quick-Step rider can challenge GC despite not being designated leader.
